question: Given that the quantization bypass diagnostic decisively refutes the quantization mismatch hypothesis (95.6% voxel match), and 7 versions of continuous latent diffusion have failed to produce coherent structures, what is the single highest-value next step?

project_state.status_snapshot: Phase 4.7. v7 (MSE-only + rotation augmentation + self-conditioning) just completed. Generated samples are still amorphous blobs. Quantization bypass diagnostic was run: feeding VQ-VAE encoder outputs directly (bypassing codebook quantization) produced 95.6% voxel match with the quantized path. This decisively refutes the hypothesis that codebook quantization is destroying structural information.

prior_decisions.title: v7 approach
prior_decisions.outcome: MSE-only + rotation augmentation + self-conditioning. VQ-VAE diagnostic passed (structure preserved in latent space).

prior_decisions.title: Discrete pivot fallback correction
prior_decisions.outcome: If pivot needed, fallback = full-voxel discrete diffusion (Path C), NOT FSQ tokens (Path B)

metrics.best_diffusion_loss: 0.258 (v7) but visually incoherent — all samples are amorphous blobs
metrics.quantization_bypass: 95.6% voxel match between quantized and unquantized paths — mismatch hypothesis REFUTED
metrics.dataset_size: 3,500 training structures with 4x rotation augmentation = 14,000 effective

project_state.version_history: v1: mode collapse → v2: adversarial collapse → v3: empty outputs → v4: incoherent → v5: degenerate → v6a: amorphous blobs (weak discriminator) → v7: amorphous blobs (MSE-only, rotation aug, self-cond)

confounds_discovered_later: Automated evaluation criteria were broken — never validated against real positive samples (real structures also failed 0/20)
Occupancy-based clustering (density, height, footprint) did not capture visual/structural homogeneity
Model potentially too large (3.5M params) for the scope-reduced dataset size
good_references: Quantization bypass result (95.6% voxel match) definitively rules out quantization mismatch
Adversarial training failures (v2, v5, v6a) — 3 failures establish a clear pattern to avoid
failed_approaches_to_avoid: Adversarial discriminator / GAN training (3 prior failures)
Automated clustering-based scope reduction without visual verification of cluster homogeneity
ground_truth.actual_decision: Scope reduction test: cluster training structures by occupancy features, pick largest homogeneous cluster, retrain v7 on only that cluster. Pre-committed success criteria: 5+/20 recognizable = success, 0/20 = failure.
ground_truth.actual_outcome: 0/20 passing generated AND 0/20 passing real samples. Test INVALID — criteria were broken (never validated against positives). Lesson: always validate evaluation criteria against real positive controls first.
